definition:
1. anything joined together, framework , of a ship, [variant datesAnthology Palantina:—;Lat. pegma, a moveable scaffold used in theatres, (Juvenal) 
2. metaphorically, π. γενναίως παγέν a bond  in honour bound, (Aeschulus Tragicus) 
3. π. τῆς χιόνος frozen  snow, (Polybius Historicus) 
 (ML)
